metadata.description: Skeptical reviewers for Claude Code — audits sessions for unverified claims and critiques plans against intent.

plugins.name: assumption-auditor
plugins.description: Two passive reviewers plus an auto-invoked feedback channel. The auditor flags unverified diagnoses, completions, assumptions, and recalls. The plan-critic critiques proposed plans for scope drift, spec violation, and internal incoherence. The log-disagreement skill auto-invokes when the user pushes back on a finding in plain language, capturing the disagreement for prompt tuning.
